name: yappatron
description: voice dictation for mac with OpenAI Realtime, local mode, always-on listening, and configurable push-to-talk.

features.title: instant streaming text
features.body: OpenAI Realtime turns your voice into text as you speak. It feels less like dictation software and more like a live voice keyboard.

features.title: built for vibe coding
features.body: Talk to your AI. Describe what you want. A humane end-of-utterance pause sends the thought when you actually stop.

features.title: modern cloud stt
features.body: OpenAI Realtime with gpt-realtime-whisper is the default fast path. Deepgram Nova-3 is still available when you want that backend.

features.title: knows who's talking
features.body: On the Deepgram backend, enroll your voice once and Yappatron can label two-person conversations with hybrid cloud + local voiceprint matching.

features.title: local or cloud — your call
features.body: Switch between OpenAI Realtime, Deepgram cloud STT, and fully local Parakeet from the menu bar. Your words, your rules.

steps.label: start talking
steps.detail: no button to press. just speak naturally wherever your cursor is.

steps.label: watch it stream
steps.detail: text appears character by character as you talk, with live corrections.

steps.label: pause to send
steps.detail: stop talking and it auto-presses enter. perfect for chatting with claude.

steps.label: keep going
steps.detail: it's always listening. start your next thought whenever you're ready.

requirements: Internet + API key for cloud STT
